ResearchProjectDef.label: TraSSTraH equipment
ResearchProjectDef.description: acquire the data required for the fabrication of a TraSSTraH series vehicle from scratch and source supplies to produce ammunition compatible with the platform.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Rudimentary Inertial propulsion
ResearchProjectDef.description: acquire the data required for the fabrication of SCALBOTS-class spacecraft from scratch.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Inertial Subsystems
ResearchProjectDef.description: acquire the data required to assemble systems derived from spacecraft engines.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Improved TraSSTraH solutions
ResearchProjectDef.description: Figure out how to tune up the basic TraSSTraH for additional performance and procure new ammo choices.
